question.label: Context-switching impact
question.name: When you mention context-switching on reviews adding up, what's the main impact on your work or focus?
question.description: Explores the specific impact of context-switching on work and focus.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: Mentoring request has been stalled for three months without pushback — strong growth-stagnation signal.

new_queue.label: Mentoring block
new_queue.name: What's blocked the mentoring from happening — your time, opportunity, or something else?

new_queue.label: Priority alignment
new_queue.name: Do you feel aligned with the team’s current priorities?

new_queue.label: Energy sustainability
new_queue.name: Is the current workload sustainable for you?

history.answer_excerpt: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week

Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
